allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:PATH"; cargo test --workspace 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'test result|FAILED|failed|error\\[' | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:PATH"; cargo test -p server 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'test |test result|error|warning: unused' | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:PATH"; cargo test --workspace 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error|FAILED|panicked|test result: FAILED|failures' | Select-Object -First 20; cargo test --workspace 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'test result' | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)
